linkedin.text:
800 people. 3 days. Zero logistics complaints reached the client.

The brief: fly 800 top performers to Mallorca and make three days feel effortless. Lose no one. Miss no minute.

What it took behind the curtain:
• 14 chartered transfers
• 800 rooms across 2 resorts
• One beachfront gala for the entire group
• A 96% post-trip satisfaction score

The complexity was ours. The experience was theirs. That's what "from business to pleasure" looks like at scale.

Planning a large-group incentive and quietly worried it can't run this smoothly? It can.

Comment "SCALE" or book a free 30-min scoping call.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EmployeeEngagement #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership

instagram.text:
800 people on one beach. One flawless night. 🎯

We flew 800 top performers to Mallorca for three days that felt effortless — and the magic was in everything they never saw.

✈️ 14 chartered transfers
🏨 800 rooms across 2 resorts
🌊 One beachfront gala for the whole group
⭐ 96% satisfaction on the post-trip survey

Not one logistics headache touched the client. That part is our job.

💬 Save this for when leadership asks "can we really pull off something this big?" — and tag the HR lead planning it.
🔗 Link in bio to start your large-group incentive.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #TeamBuilding #LuxuryTravel #EventPlanning #WorkPerks #CompanyCulture

facebook.text:
A client once asked us a simple, terrifying question: can you fly 800 of our best people to Mallorca and make three days feel effortless? 🎯

So we did.

14 chartered transfers. 800 rooms across two resorts. A beachfront gala for the entire group. And when the survey came back: 96% satisfaction.

The part they're proudest of? Not a single logistics complaint ever reached them. The chaos was ours to absorb — the experience was theirs to enjoy.

That's what producing at scale really means.

Planning a big-group incentive and wondering if it can run this smoothly? Tell us in the comments, or send us a message.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #MICE #B2BEvents

image_prompt: Elevated wide shot from behind a crowd of around 800 corporate guests filling a grand Mallorca seaside venue at night, all viewed from the rear so faces are tiny, warm amber stage glow ahead of them washing over the sea of heads, palm silhouettes framing the edges, dark Balearic coastline and night sky beyond. Photorealistic, 35mm film grain, no CGI, no text, no logos.
